description_long: This adult pedestrian is dressed in traditional attire reminiscent of a historical or folkloric figure, featuring a wide-brimmed hat adorned with circular decorations and tassels. The individual wears a fitted jacket with studded detailing along the shoulders and chest, paired with matching pants. A scarf is tied around the neck, adding a distinctive accessory to the ensemble. The footwear consists of open-toed sandals, and the hands are left uncovered. The face is framed by medium-length hair, and the overall appearance suggests a character with cultural or period-specific significance. The outfit is detailed with visible seams, buttons, and layered fabric textures.
description: An adult pedestrian in traditional, period-inspired attire with a decorated wide-brimmed hat, studded jacket, scarf, and open-toed sandals.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, facial features, scarf, and decorative hat details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, the layered jacket, and the open-toed sandals.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the crisscrossed straps on the back, the back of the hat, and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the hat, jacket, and sandals.
attribute_clothing_type: traditional folkloric outfit with a wide-brimmed decorated hat, studded jacket, scarf, and loose pants
